task: Check the most recent full-time medical health and safety jobs, requiring 1-3 years of industry experience available in the US.
graderReasoning: The agent reached Amazon Jobs search results and applied the requested constraints with visible evidence on screen: Industry Experience = 1-3 years, Job Type = Full Time, Job Category = Medical, Health, & Safety, and Country/Region = United States. The agent then changed sorting to 'Most recent' and extracted the visible first-page listings from a focused snapshot of the results section. The final table matches the jobs shown in the snapshot, including titles, US locations, posted dates, and job IDs.
